title: Let's Go, Ganger
overview: When the shape-shifting alien Blasters invade Earth to steal its oxygen, humanity's only chance is Ganger, a robot of living metal merged with a half-human/half-alien boy.

title: The Living Robot
overview: Kantaro learns more about the legacy his alien mother left him, while the Blasters plan on using a freeze ray to immobilize their new enemy, Ganger.

title: The Burning Island Plot
overview: The Blasters cause a volcano to erupt so they can take over a populated island for their latest plot.

title: Rainbow of Terror
overview: The Blasters use a giant moving rainbow that drains all nature of its vitality.

title: Search for Ganger's Plot
overview: In an attempt to learn Ganger's secret, the Blasters send one of their own to Earth, in the form of Maya, Kantaro's mother.

title: Rusty Ganger
overview: The Ganger's latest secret weapon has Ganger trapped and suddenly rusting out inside an underground cavern.

title: Space Bomber
overview: While Ganger is on a deep space mission, the Blasters redirect a rocket with a nuclear warhead towards ISP Branch 4 on Earth.

title: Space Hounds
overview: The Blasters send voracious, ball-like Space Hounds to Earth to devour Ganger.

title: Suspicious Granny
overview: An old woman in sad circumstances has the trust of Rie and her family. Too bad she's a Blaster in disguise.

title: I'm Strong! Ganger
overview: The Blasters brainwash Rie's young cousin and put him in a fake Ganger robot to battle the real thing.

title: Earth is Ours!
overview: The Blasters toy with the idea of annihilating all life on Earth and then starting over, but will proceed only if a certain experiment is successful.

title: The Valley of Shooting Stars
overview: While camping, Kantaro and Rie discover an experimental Blaster teleportation device that's guarded by a psychotic old man.

title: Showdown in the White Wilderness!!
overview: A giant Blaster robot threatens to destroy major cities until Ganger shows up for a showdown, but Kantaro is in the hospital, unconscious with a high fever.

title: Showdown Under the Midnight Sun
overview: Late at night, snowmen come to life and attack the town courtesy of Bad Snow, an alien villain in league with the Blasters.

title: Secret of the Aurora
overview: A sunspot monster in the form of a fairy causes a mysterious aurora that drains the city of its power.

title: Blaster Declaration of War
overview: The Blasters threaten Earth with a formal declaration of war and assured destruction from a powerful alien ally unless humans surrender and turn over Ganger.

title: The Horrible Spy Monster
overview: The Blasters brainwash an employee of ISP (and friend of Kantaro) and use him to find Ganger's secret or blow up the buildings if he can't.

title: Chain Mail Whirlpool
overview: When Kantaro gets a space disease, Ganger has to rush him to his mother's home planet for a cure, but the Blasters intercept them with a death trap.

title: Time Bomb Robot Monster
overview: Rie escapes Blaster captivity, but can she warn Ganger in time that the giant robot he's battling will explode with an antimatter bomb in a matter of moments?

title: The Lensmer Avatar Plot
overview: A robot steps out of a popular manga magazine every time the page is opened and abducts the child reader, including Rie and Kantaro.

title: The Robot Force Has Come!
overview: Ganger investigates when children go missing inside a robot theater on the outskirts of town.

title: Space Ghost Ship
overview: The Blasters and Ganger vie for possession of a space ghost ship with a secret weapon.

title: Duel on Kantaros
overview: After a disastrous duel, Ganger and Kantaro are stranded on Kantaro's mother's dead home planet.

title: Aim For His Chest Pendant!
overview: Kantaro feels the pain as Ganger is tortured millions of miles away.

title: The Devil's Eye
overview: Blaster Devil employs mind control powers and Rie's abduction in an attempt to make Ganger surrender.

title: Space Panther
overview: Must Ganger make the ultimate sacrifice to save Earth once and for all from the Blasters?
